channel.title: NAM Rodríguez-Rubio, JC Figueira, D Acuña-Castroviejo, AM Borobia, G Escames, P de la Oliva | PlatCOVID
channel.description: NAM Rodríguez-Rubio, JC Figueira, D Acuña-Castroviejo, AM Borobia, G Escames, P de la Oliva

image.title: NAM Rodríguez-Rubio, JC Figueira, D Acuña-Castroviejo, AM Borobia, G Escames, P de la Oliva

item.title: A phase II, single-center, double-blind, randomized placebo-controlled trial to explore the efficacy and safety of intravenous melatonin in patients with COVID-19 admitted to the intensive care unit (MelCOVID study): a structured summary of a study protocol for a randomized controlled trial.
